poses.description: Stand upright with feet together and palms pressed together at the heart center.
poses.benefits: Establishes calm, centers attention, and prepares the mind.
instructions: Stand at the front edge of your mat with feet together.
Distribute your weight evenly on both feet.
Inhale, expand your chest, and relax your shoulders.
Exhale and press your palms together in front of your chest.
poses.voicePrompt: Prayer Pose, or Pranamasana. Stand tall at the front of your mat. Bring your hands together at your heart center. Exhale, grounding yourself, and set a calm intention.
poses.sanskritInstructions: प्रणामासनं कुर्यात्। करसम्पुटं हृदयस्थाने धारयन्तु। दीर्घं निःश्वस्य शान्तं भवन्तु।

poses.description: Inhale and reach arms upward and backward, stretching the whole body.
poses.benefits: Stretches chest and abdomen, improves digestion, tones arm muscles.
instructions: Inhale and lift your arms up and backward.
Keep your biceps close to your ears.
Gently push your hips forward and arch back slightly.
Stretches the whole body from the heels to the tips of the fingers.
poses.voicePrompt: Raised Arms Pose, Hastauttanasana. Inhale deeply, sweep your arms up and slightly back. Reach through your fingertips, stretching your entire front body.
poses.sanskritInstructions: हस्तौत्तानासनं कुर्यात्। उद्गस्य हस्तौ ऊर्ध्वं प्रयच्छन्तु। सर्वशरीरं दीर्घतानन्तु।

poses.description: Exhale, hinge at the hips, and fold forward to touch the ground or shins.
poses.benefits: Stretches hamstrings and spine, relieves tension, increases circulation.
instructions: Exhale and bend forward from the hips, keeping the spine long.
Bring the hands down next to the feet on the mat.
Relax your head and neck downward.
Softly bend knees if hamstrings are tight.
poses.voicePrompt: Standing Forward Bend, Uttanasana. Exhale, hinge from your hips, and fold forward completely. Let your head hand heavy and touch the mat or your shins.
poses.sanskritInstructions: उत्तानासनं कुर्यात्। अधोगत्वा पार्श्वपादौ स्पृशन्तु। शिरोग्रीवं शिथिलीकुर्यात्।

poses.description: Inhale, step your right leg far back, drop knee down, and lift chest up.
poses.benefits: Stretches hip flexors, strengthens legs, opens chest.
instructions: Inhale and step your right leg as far back as comfortable.
Lower your right knee to the mat and untuck the toes.
Keep your left knee aligned directly over your left ankle.
Lift your chest, roll shoulders back, and look forward or slightly up.
poses.voicePrompt: Lunge Pose, Ashwa Sanchalanasana. Inhale, step your right leg far back, lowering the knee. Lift your chest and gaze forward, opening your hips.
poses.sanskritInstructions: अश्वसञ्चालनासनं कुर्यात्। दक्षिणपादं पृष्ठे स्थापयन्तु। वक्षःप्रसास्य अग्रे पश्यन्तु।

poses.description: Step left leg back into a strong, straight-line plank posture.
poses.benefits: Strengthens core, arms, shoulders, and wrists.
instructions: Hold your breath and step your left foot back next to the right foot.
Align your shoulders directly over your wrists.
Keep your body in a straight line from head to heels.
Engage your core and thighs, do not let your lower back sag.
poses.voicePrompt: Plank Pose, Phalakasana. Step your left foot back to meet the right. Hold your breath and support your body in a solid, straight line from head to heels.
poses.sanskritInstructions: फलकासनं कुर्यात्। वामपादं पृष्ठे स्थापयन्तु। शरीरं सरलरेखा-रूपेण धारयन्तु।

poses.description: Lower knees, chest, and chin down to the floor, hips slightly raised.
poses.benefits: Strengthens back, shoulders, arms, and chest.
instructions: Exhale and gently lower your knees to the mat.
Lower your chest and chin to the floor between your hands.
Keep your hips slightly elevated off the ground.
Eight points of the body should touch the floor.
poses.voicePrompt: Eight-Limbed Pose, Ashtanga Namaskara. Exhale and lower your knees, chest, and chin to the mat. Keep your hips slightly elevated.
poses.sanskritInstructions: अष्टाङ्गनमस्कारं कुर्यात्। जानु-वक्षः-हनु भूमौ स्थापयन्तु। नितम्बं कोष्ठोन्नतं धारयन्तु।

poses.description: Inhale, slide forward and lift chest up with bent elbows.
poses.benefits: Strengthens spine, opens shoulders and chest, tones back.
instructions: Slide your chest forward, untuck your toes, and press tops of feet into mat.
Inhale and lift your chest, keeping elbows bent and tucked in.
Keep your shoulders rolled away from your ears.
Gaze forward or slightly upward.
poses.voicePrompt: Cobra Pose, Bhujangasana. Inhale, slide forward and lift your chest up. Keep your elbows bent and close to your body, opening your heart.
poses.sanskritInstructions: भुजङ्गासनं कुर्यात्। अग्रे सर्प-रूपेण शरीरं ऊर्ध्वं उत्थापयन्तु। वक्षःप्रसास्य हृदयं उद्भासन्तु।

poses.description: Exhale, tuck toes, lift hips up and back into an inverted V-shape.
poses.benefits: Energizes body, stretches hamstrings, calves, and shoulders.
instructions: Exhale, tuck your toes, and push your hips up and backward.
Form an inverted 'V' shape with your body.
Press your palms firmly into the mat, fingers spread wide.
Try to lower your heels toward the ground, relaxing your neck.
poses.voicePrompt: Downward-Facing Dog, Adho Mukha Svanasana. Exhale, tuck your toes, and lift your hips high and back. Press your hands into the mat, stretching your spine.
poses.sanskritInstructions: अधोमुखश्वानासनं कुर्यात्। नितम्बं ऊर्ध्वं प्रयच्छन्तु। सर्वशरीरं पर्वताकारं धारयन्तु।

poses.description: Inhale, step your right foot forward between your hands, left knee down.
poses.benefits: Opens hip flexors and pelvis, improves posture.
instructions: Inhale and step your right foot forward between your hands.
Lower your left knee to the mat.
Roll your shoulders back, lift your chest, and look forward.
Ensure your right knee is stacked directly above your right ankle.
poses.voicePrompt: Lunge Pose, Ashwa Sanchalanasana. Inhale, step your left leg far back, lowering the knee. Lift your chest and gaze forward, opening your hips.
poses.sanskritInstructions: अश्वसञ्चालनासनं कुर्यात्। दक्षिणपादं अग्रे स्थापयन्तु। अग्रे पश्यन्तु।

poses.description: Ground your feet, stand upright with arms by your side, and breathe steadily.
poses.benefits: Improves posture, strengthens thighs, knees, and ankles.
instructions: Stand with big toes touching, heels slightly apart.
Engage your thighs and lift your kneecaps.
Let your arms hang naturally with palms facing forward.
Inhale deeply, expanding your torso.
poses.voicePrompt: Mountain Pose, Tadasana. Ground your feet firmly into the earth. Stand tall, relax your shoulders, and breathe with power and clarity.
poses.sanskritInstructions: ताडासनं कुर्यात्। समस्थिति। पादौ भूमौ धारयन्तु। स्वास्थ्य स्थितौ भवन्तु।

poses.description: Step your left leg back, bend your front knee, and sweep your arms high.
poses.benefits: Stretches chest and lungs, strengthens shoulders, arms, and back.
instructions: Step your left foot back about 3 to 4 feet.
Turn your left foot out 45 degrees and align your hips to the front.
Bend your right knee to 90 degrees.
Inhale, sweep your arms high with palms facing.
poses.voicePrompt: Warrior 1. Step your left leg back and sweep your arms high. Square your hips forward, bend your front knee, and stand strong.
poses.sanskritInstructions: वीरभद्रासनं प्रथमं कुर्यात्। वामपादं पृष्ठे धारयन्तु, हस्तौ ऊर्ध्वं उत्थापयन्तु।

poses.description: Open your arms wide parallel to the floor, gazing forward over your right hand.
poses.benefits: Strengthens legs and ankles, stretches chest and shoulders.
instructions: From Warrior I, open your hips and arms to the side.
Extend your arms straight in opposite directions.
Keep your right knee bent at 90 degrees.
Gaze steadily over your right fingertips.
poses.voicePrompt: Warrior 2. Open your arms and hips to the side. Extend your energy through both fingertips, looking forward past your front hand.
poses.sanskritInstructions: वीरभद्रासनं द्वितीयं कुर्यात्। हस्तौ पार्श्वे प्रसार्यन्तु, अग्रे पश्यन्तु।

poses.description: Straighten your front leg, hinge at your hip, and reach down to your shin or floor.
poses.benefits: Stretches spine, chest, hips, and hamstrings; relieves stress.
instructions: Straighten your front right leg.
Hinge at the front hip, reaching forward with your right hand.
Tilt your torso down, bringing your right hand to your shin or floor.
Extend your left arm straight up toward the sky.
poses.voicePrompt: Triangle Pose, Trikonasana. Straighten your front leg, lean forward, and open your arms vertically. Feel the deep side stretch and spine lengthening.

poses.description: Rest your knees on the floor, push your hips to your heels, and relax your forehead down.
poses.benefits: Calms brain, relieves back and neck pain, gently stretches hips.
instructions: Drop your knees to the mat and sit back on your heels.
Extend your arms fully in front of you.
Lower your chest and forehead to the floor.
Breathe deeply into your lower back.
poses.voicePrompt: Child's Pose, Balasana. Sink your hips back to your heels and rest your forehead. Let go of all effort and breathe deeply.
poses.sanskritInstructions: बालासनं कुर्यात्। नितम्बौ पादपृष्ठे स्थापयन्तु, शिरो भूमौ नमन्तु। शान्तं भवन्तु।

poses.description: Lie on your belly, resting on your forearms with chest gently lifted.
poses.benefits: Gently stimulates the lumbar curve, opens chest, stimulates thyroid.
instructions: Lie face down on the mat.
Bring elbows directly under your shoulders, forearms flat on the floor.
Inhale, press into your forearms, and gently lift your chest.
Relax your glutes and lower back completely.
poses.voicePrompt: Sphinx Pose. Prop yourself onto your forearms, relaxing your lower body completely. Lift your chest gently and enjoy this mild back-bend.
poses.sanskritInstructions: सालम्बभुजङ्गासनं कुर्यात्। कूर्परौ भूमौ धारयन्तु, ऊर्ध्वं पश्यन्तु।

poses.description: Sit upright, bring soles of your feet together, and let your knees fall out wide.
poses.benefits: Opens groin and inner thighs, relieves fatigue, improves hip flexibility.
instructions: Sit tall and draw your feet in toward your pelvis.
Press the soles of your feet together.
Allow your knees to fall open toward the sides.
Gently fold forward if comfortable.
poses.voicePrompt: Butterfly Pose, Baddha Konasana. Bring the soles of your feet together, letting your knees open wide. Fold forward slightly to release the hips.

poses.description: Lie on your back, draw knees to chest, and drop them to the side.
poses.benefits: Massages abdominal organs, stretches spine and glutes, calms mind.
instructions: Lie flat on your back.
Bring your knees to a 90-degree bend above your hips.
Lower both knees to the left side while keeping shoulders flat.
Extend your right arm to the side and look over your right shoulder.
poses.voicePrompt: Reclined Spinal Twist. Lay on your back and drop your knees to the side. Open your chest flat toward the sky, breathing ease into your spine.

poses.description: Lie flat on your back, feet wide, arms relaxed with palms up.
poses.benefits: Reduces heart rate, deeply integrates physical practice, calms central nervous system.
instructions: Lie fully flat on your back.
Let your feet turn out naturally.
Bring arms slightly away from the body with palms up.
Close your eyes and sink into complete stillness.
poses.voicePrompt: Corpse Pose, Savasana. Lie completely flat on your back, letting your whole body surrender. Close your eyes, be absolutely still, and rest. Namaste.
poses.sanskritInstructions: शवासनं कुर्यात्। सर्वशरीरं शिथिलीकुर्यात्, ध्यानमयस्थितौ विश्रामन्तु। ओम्, शान्तिः, शान्तिः, शान्तिः।
